title: Namaste England
desc: After her marriage with Param, Jasmeet wishes to move to London and establish her career.

desc: Param and Jasmeet's relationship faces turmoil as they chase their dream of relocating to England. Misunderstandings and struggles test their bond, forcing them to confront love and ambition.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
desc: Shyamsunder, an aspiring musician, juggles between two wives in the same city.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
desc: Believing his wife Pooja died in a flood, Shyamsunder marries Divya. When he discovers Pooja is alive, he struggles to juggle both marriages, keeping his double life a secret.

title: Ghajini
desc: A man who loses his memory every 15 minutes seeks vengeance after his lover is killed.

title: Ghajini
desc: A rich businessman, Sanjay, loves Kalpana. Ghajini kills her and harms him, leaving memory loss. Two years later, he seeks revenge by recording clues everywhere.

title: Mission Raniganj
desc: An engineer leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Kakuda
desc: Three locals confront a ghost in a cursed town stuck in time, mixing scares and laughs as they challenge superstitions, traditions, and love itself.

title: Kakuda
desc: Sunny, a resident of a haunted village, approaches a ghost hunter after being cursed.

desc: During the pandemic lockdown, the lives of a female pilot, a retired father, a prostitute, and a migrant worker are thrown into turmoil as government restrictions create widespread hardship.

desc: Based on the 1981 American film 'Body Heat'.
